posts.author: SimonKD (Simon Davies)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m hoping this is really obvious and I am missing something really simple.

Basically I want to be able to create a form that pulls some data from a board. In this case it’s client names, that I want to be selected in the form before the other data is added. Is this possible?
